summary.lv: Ubiquiti Rīgas R&D komanda meklē Front-End izstrādātāju ar 3+ gadu pieredzi JavaScript, TypeScript un React, lai veidotu plaši izmantotus tīmekļa pakalpojumus un UI.
summary.en: Ubiquiti's Riga R&D team is looking for a Front-End Developer with 3+ years of JavaScript, TypeScript and React experience to build widely-used web services and UIs.
